name: Royal Hawaiian Wedding Cake
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------FROSTING-------------------------
6 oz Crushed pineapple with juice
4 oz Instant vanilla pudding
1/3 cup Light rum
2 Pints Whipping cream; Coconut for garnish
Mix all cake ingredients per package instructions. Divide batter into 8 or 9 inch greased and floured cake pans, bake at temperature listed on the box. Divide each layer into two layers – resulting in 6 layers total. Soak pineapple with rum for about 30 minutes. Mix pudding and let set until gelled. Whip whipping cream (place metal mixing bowl and beaters in freezer before whipping for best results; also chill pints of cream for several minutes before whipping). Whip cream until stiff, but not buttery. Gently fold pudding mixture into whipped cream. Toast coconut lightly in the oven. Alternate layers of cake with thick whipped cream. Garnish with toasted coconut. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 8 hours to allow flavors to meld before serving.
